# UHCR Documentation
Welcome to the Universal Hardware Compilation Runtime (UHCR) documentation. 

## Navigation Map
All documentation pages use hash-routing for static hosting safety.

- Core Overview: https://vishveshjoshi89.github.io/UHCR-DOCS/#/
- Getting Started Guide: https://vishveshjoshi89.github.io/UHCR-DOCS/#/docs/quickstart
- Plugin Builder Workspace: https://vishveshjoshi89.github.io/UHCR-DOCS/#/plugin-builder
- Working of UHCR: https://vishveshjoshi89.github.io/UHCR-DOCS/#/docs/how-uhcr-works

## Project Architecture Notes
UHCR provides an interactive runtime plugin builder environment for JIT compiling across CPU, GPU, and custom hardware backends.
